name: instagram-follow-back-checker
description: A browser script that checks which Instagram accounts do not follow back with exact-search verification.
author: dongt10

scripts.check: node --check src/check-follow-back.js && node scripts/verify-bookmarklet.mjs && node scripts/verify-generic.mjs && node scripts/verify-exact-search.mjs && node scripts/verify-rate-limit-wall.mjs
